_note: This file is the campaign log for the Chronicle app. Both the raw schema arrays and the viewer-format combat_encounters (with compact round slots) are included.

meta.notes: Exploring the Pylon mystery following the death of Ched Warmfire. Currently traveling West toward Lake Town to earn funds before pivoting Northeast to Belfar.

party.name: Zragar

milestones.note: Reached after the Siege of Bagyers Farm.

party.notes: Familiar: Index the Owl. Expert in historical adventure chronicles. Tail-less gold dragonborn bladesinger (longsword).

milestones.note: Reached after the Siege of Bagyers Farm.
Reached after the Siege of Bagyers Farm.

session_logs.title: The Coming of Age
session_logs.summary: Prologue at age 13 featuring the first Pylon event and a wolf fight; jumps 5 years to age 18. Lifelong childhood friends remain tight-knit.

session_logs.title: Vespons & Siege of Bagyers Farm (Part 1)
session_logs.summary: The party is in their treehouse in Atticus's clearing when a Vespon swarm is detected in the woods. Transitioned to defending Bagyers Farm from a new Pylon emergence.
session_logs.narrative_vibe: High-pitched buzzing; panic; frantic defense; smell of sulfur.

mechanical_notes.note: Ashton piloted by David due to Frazer being sick.

session_logs.title: Siege Conclusion
session_logs.summary: The Pylon defense concluded with the destruction of the monolith. Ched Warmfire was killed in the battle. The party resolved to set out into the world following leads from Blair and Ched's past.
session_logs.narrative_vibe: Somber; heavy loss; sulfurous smell of black goo.
key_moments: Discovery of Bessel's Spellbook and local maps
Blair provides quests for Menne's Ranch and Belfar

session_logs.title: To Menne's Ranch
session_logs.summary: Escorted Carly to Menne's Ranch. Successfully negotiated a trade agreement with Helen for potion components (rewarded 50GP). Helen then requested aid with a Quarry infestation.
session_logs.narrative_vibe: Classic adventure feel; echoes in the subterranean dark.

mechanical_notes.note: Malachite piloted by David due to Lance's work schedule.

key_moments: The 'Goonies Slide' in the Rat Cave

session_logs.title: The Road West
session_logs.summary: Finished the ROUS fight at the Quarry. Met travelers and agreed to escort them west to Lake Town due to goblin sightings. A goblin ambush began on the road.
session_logs.narrative_vibe: Tense; vigilant; smell of damp hills and goblin musk.

character_moments.description: Atticus healed Asphodel immediately after they were downed by a flurry of goblin/ogre attacks, keeping the frontline from collapsing.
Malachite landed a devastating critical hit on a ROUS, described narratively as a 'SPLAT!' that set the tone for the cleanup.
The party shares a childhood history of playing at 'Atticus's Clearing,' having utilized an expanded treehouse as their base for make-believe adventures long before becoming actual adventurers.

npc_directory.name: Ched Warmfire
npc_directory.notes: Village leader, Goli's uncle. Retired Fighter. Bitter and protective after his original party was decimated. Killed during the Siege of Bagyers Farm.

npc_directory.name: Krustie Gnome
npc_directory.notes: Gnome at Quarry camp; provided directions to the Rat Cave location.

npc_directory.name: Blair
npc_directory.notes: Cleric survivor of Ched's old party. Skilled potion brewer; provided quests for Menne's Ranch and Belfar.

npc_directory.name: Helen
npc_directory.notes: Primary contact at Menne's Ranch. Negotiated potion trade agreement; provided Quarry ROUS quest. Paid 30 GP reward for completion of supply chain quest.

npc_directory.name: Carly
npc_directory.notes: Male caravan owner escorted safely to Menne's Ranch during the Axe Beak ambush in Session 4.

npc_directory.name: Bessel
npc_directory.notes: Fire/Wizard. Member of Ched's original party.

npc_directory.name: Hawk
npc_directory.notes: Ranger. Member of Ched's original party.

npc_directory.name: Darnell
npc_directory.notes: Contact in Belfar mentioned by Blair and on Ched's map.

npc_directory.name: Kiki
npc_directory.notes: Connection for jobs in Green Harbor.

bestiary.name: Vespon Swarm
traits: Can be put to sleep via Sleep spell
Entombed via Mold Earth in cbt_001 finale

bestiary.name: Vespon Queen
traits: Sonic Buzz ability (downed Asphodel in Round 2 of cbt_001)
Killed by Asphodel in Round 4 of cbt_001

bestiary.name: Goblin Slinger
traits: Operated in coordinated group with standard goblins and Ogre

bestiary.name: Ogre
traits: Appeared mid-combat after initial goblin wave
Killed by Atticus via Ice Knife in Round 3 of cbt_005
High melee damage output (12 damage on Malachite, Round 3)

bestiary.name: Giant Rat (ROUS)
traits: Referred to in-game as ROUS (Rodents of Unusual Size)
Pack creature, encountered in large numbers
Found in cavern accessed via water slide near The Quarry

world_lore.title: Historical Anomaly of Pylons
world_lore.content: No history of Pylons exists in Goldie's chronicles prior to 5 years ago.

world_lore.title: Ched's Original Party
world_lore.content: Consisted of Ched (Fighter), Blair (Cleric), Bessel (Wizard), and Hawk (Ranger). They were decimated in the past.

inventory_and_loot.name: Ched's Map
inventory_and_loot.notes: Five markers: Darnell in Belfar (loc_006, npc_011), Kiki in Green Harbor (loc_012, npc_012), Fish in Sholes Ford (loc_009), Western '?' (loc_010), Southern 'X' (loc_013).

inventory_and_loot.name: Bessel's Spellbook
inventory_and_loot.notes: Contains L1-L3 spells: Shield, MM, Mage Armor, Find Familiar, Absorb Elements, Detect Magic, Comp Languages, Misty Step, Scorching Ray, Knock, Spider Climb, Fireball, Tiny Hut. Note: Goldie will gain access to these as he grows in level.

inventory_and_loot.name: Potions of Healing
inventory_and_loot.notes: 4 potions found in an adventuring chest.

inventory_and_loot.name: Trade Commission
inventory_and_loot.notes: 30 GP total received from Helen at Menne's Ranch for the Potion Supply quest.

inventory_and_loot.name: Unrefined Emerald
inventory_and_loot.description: Reward for ROUS cave. Valued at 100 GP.

locations.name: Riverbend
locations.description: Home village on bluffs above Merelane River.

locations.name: The Quarry
locations.description: Dwarven/Gnomish site 2 days walk Southwest of Menne's Ranch. Site of ROUS infestation. Contains a camp of temporary tents and few permanent structures for workers.

locations.name: Bagyers Farm
locations.description: Site of the Pylon emergence and Ched's death.

locations.name: Menne's Ranch
locations.description: Horse-farming community North of Riverbend. Prime horse country with a Main Street featuring a Tavern and Shop.

locations.name: The Rat Cave
locations.description: Infested cavern located near The Quarry. Accessed via a water slide into a dark, echoing chamber.

locations.name: Belfar
locations.description: City to the Northeast. Primary destination for Pylon research.

locations.name: The Northern Woods
locations.description: Dense forest extending north of Riverbend. Site of the Vespon Queen encounter (cbt_001). The party's childhood exploration grounds.

locations.name: Atticus's Clearing
locations.description: A specific grove within the Northern Woods where Atticus grew up. Contains the party's childhood treehouse base. Site of the Vespon Queen encounter (cbt_001).

locations.name: Sholes Ford
locations.description: Name on Ched's Map. Contact: Fish. No other context recorded.

locations.name: Western Unknown
locations.description: Marked with '?' on Ched's Map. Location and significance unknown.

locations.name: Lake Town
locations.description: Approx. 2 days west of The Quarry. Current temporary destination.

locations.name: Southern Unknown
locations.description: Marked with 'X' on Ched's Map. Location and significance unknown.

progress_log.entry: Blair suggested finding Darnell in Belfar.

objectives.description: Find Darnell in Belfar to learn about Ched's past.

progress_log.entry: First Pylon witnessed by the group.
Bagyers Farm Pylon neutralized via Eldritch Blast.

objectives.description: Seek information in Belfar about the Pylons.

progress_log.entry: Accepted 6 GP/person contract to escort stone-trading caravan to Lake Town. Ambushed by goblins mid-route.
Escorted Carly (m) and established trade agreement with Helen at Menne's Ranch.

objectives.description: Establish trade agreement with Helen at Menne's Ranch.

progress_log.entry: Received directions from Krustie; discovered the Rat Cave via a water slide into the cavern.
Cleared the nest. Provided tails to Krustie Gnome. Reward (100 GP Emerald) received.

objectives.description: Clear the ROUS infestation from the cave near The Quarry.

combat_encounters_raw.name: Vespon Queen & Swarm
combat_encounters_raw.narrative_context: Encounter in the woods near the Atticus's clearing and treehouse.

enemy_actions.description: Queen uses Sonic Buzz on Asphodel

rounds.round_summary: Queen killed; remaining swarm put to sleep and entombed via Mold Earth.

combat_encounters_raw.finale: Atti and Goldie used Mold Earth to entomb the sleeping swarm.

combat_encounters_raw.name: Siege of Bagyers Farm
combat_encounters_raw.narrative_context: Sulfur smell; Pylon pulses spawn Rock Lobsters. Mentor Ched Warmfire killed.

initiative_grid.notes: Nat 20 on main hand; off-hand missed
Nat 20 on main hand; off-hand missed

enemy_actions.description: Rock Lobster hits Goli and Asphodel

initiative_grid.notes: 1 Rock Lobster killed; closing distance to Pylon

enemy_actions.description: Rock Lobster hits Goldie and Ashton

rounds.round_summary: Pylon collapses and begins to dissolve; spawns continue fighting.

enemy_actions.description: Rock Lobster hits Atticus and Ashton
2 hits on Malachite from 2 separate Rock Lobsters

rounds.finale: Victory. Pylon neutralized. All spawns defeated. Ched Warmfire confirmed dead.

combat_encounters_raw.finale: The party barely survived the 19-round siege. Ched Warmfire was killed in the chaos. Loot recovered from a chest in the aftermath.

combat_encounters_raw.name: Axe Beak & Vespon Ambush

rounds.notes: Axe Beaks alert about woods; flee. Owl spots 4 Vespon swarms.

enemy_actions.description: 1 swarm attacks each horse (2 total). Del hit.

initiative_grid.notes: 2 Vespon failed save; wake up after.

enemy_actions.description: Both horses killed. Attack against Del takes him down.

combat_encounters_raw.aftermath: Del, Atticus, and Goldie turned familiars into goats to pull the wagon to Menne's Ranch.

combat_encounters_raw.name: The Rat Cave
combat_encounters_raw.narrative_context: Party enters via Goonies-style slide near the Quarry camp. Standardized as ROUS.

initiative_grid.notes: Used Shield as reaction to block OAs; 4 ROUS saved

enemy_actions.description: Party heavy damage: Goli (10 dmg), Del (3 dmg), Mal (4 dmg), Ash (16 dmg)
Del's familiar (Deer) killed. Ash (4 dmg), Del (4 dmg)

combat_encounters_raw.name: Goblin Ambush
combat_encounters_raw.narrative_context: Ambush on road west of the Quarry. Paused end of Round 3.

enemy_actions.description: Goblins move; Ogre appears; Slinger hits Del
Goblins: Del (3 dmg), Mal (3 dmg). Slingers: Del (7 dmg) - Del is DOWN. Ogre: Mal (10 dmg)

initiative_grid.notes: Ogre killed. Mal saved vs burst.

enemy_actions.description: Goblin: Mal (4 dmg). Ogre (before death): Mal (12 dmg). Slingers: Del (4 dmg)

combat_encounters_raw.narrative_context: Prologue combat at age 13. The party's first encounter as a group. Took place near Riverbend. Round-by-round details to be provided.
